name: dash-mcp-server
description: Search and browse documentation from Dash, the macOS API documentation browser.
long_description: Access your Dash documentation library directly from Claude. List installed docsets, search across documentation and code snippets, load full documentation pages, and enable full-text search for specific docsets. Dash supports 200+ docsets including Swift, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js, Ruby, Go, Rust, Java, C++, Django, Ruby on Rails, PostgreSQL, Docker, and many more.

tools.name: list_installed_docsets
tools.description: List all installed documentation sets in Dash.

tools.name: search_documentation
tools.description: Search for documentation across docsets and code snippets.

tools.name: load_documentation_page
tools.description: Load a documentation page from a search result URL.

tools.name: enable_docset_fts
tools.description: Enable full-text search for a specific docset.
